name: Orlando Hernández
transactions: March 23, 1998:Signed by theNew York Yankeesas an amateur free agent.
January 15, 2003:Traded by theNew York Yankeesto theChicago White SoxforEddi Candelario(minors) andAntonio Osuna.
January 15, 2003:Traded by theChicago White SoxwithRocky Biddle,Jeff Lieferand cash to theMontreal ExposforJorge Nuñez(minors) andBartolo Colón.
March 12, 2004:Signed as a Free Agent with theNew York Yankees.
January 3, 2005:Signed as a Free Agent with theChicago White Sox.
